title: habenaria brevicalcar
intro: Habenaria brevicalcar, also known as the yellowish greenish brown orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Habenaria brevicalcar include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Habenaria brevicalcar typically involve boiling the roots in water, followed by straining and consuming the resulting liquid as a tea or using it as a topical application.
